patch.value: Advanced relevance tuning (post-v0.1): cross-encoder reranking + query expansion

PRD line 1677 defers advanced relevance tuning. Add opt-in cross-encoder reranking on hybrid top-N and LLM query expansion before embedding to improve recall/precision for agent queries on large corpora.

search.rerank{enabled,model,top_k} and search.query_expansion{enabled,provider} blocks; opt-in, degrade gracefully offline; filters output flags; provider abstraction; mock-provider tests; no regression to keyword/hybrid.
